title: Handles!
description: Adds 2 handles which allow for weapon upgrades and a new boss.
body:
### [Requires Fabric API. Custom textures made by my friend TomatoIcecream]

Obtained rarely from Ancient City chests, this mod adds 2 new handles which can be used to upgrade netherite weapons and give them new abilities. Combine one handle with the other, and a new **boss** shall be summoned...

Inspired by Hypixel Skyblock's "Voidgloom Seraph" boss, this enemy can prove to be decently challenging. After it is killed, it will grant you 1 of 4 **Resistant Netherite** armor pieces. Each piece will reduce your knockback further, and with a full set, **your new weapon abilities will be upgraded!**

Here are some small tips for the fight:
- Summon the boss in a flat arena!
- Bring all your best gear and golden apples.
- When it gets **angry**, look in the eyes.
- When hearing the sound of **dolphins**, shoot a projectile.
- When its about to **explode**, quickly hit it with any melee attack.

Have fun!
